aiTitle: 构建系统与 CPU 指令集配置

content.content:
1	cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
2	
3	# Toggle: default to system compilers; optionally use conda toolchain
4	option(USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN "Use C/C++ compilers and libraries from active conda env" OFF)
5	option(LLAMA_NATIVE "llama: enable -march=native flag" OFF)
6	option(LLAMA_AVX "llama: enable AVX" OFF)
7	option(LLAMA_AVX2 "llama: enable AVX2" OFF)
8	# AVX512 options will be auto-detected by cmake/DetectCPU.cmake
9	# Users can override with -DLLAMA_AVX512=OFF etc.
10	option(LLAMA_FMA "llama: enable FMA" OFF)
11	# in MSVC F16C is implied with AVX2/AVX512
12	if(NOT MSVC)
13	    option(LLAMA_F16C "llama: enable F16C" OFF)
14	endif()
15	option(LLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD "llama: enable AVX512-VL, AVX512-BW, AVX512-DQ, AVX512-VNNI" OFF)
16	option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA "ktransformers: use CUDA" OFF)
17	option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA "ktransformers: use MUSA" OFF)
18	option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM "ktransformers: use ROCM" OFF)
19	option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA "ktransformers: use MACA" OFF)
20	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CUDA_STATIC_RUNTIME "ktransformers: statically link CUDA runtime" ON)
21	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML "ktransformers: CPU use KML" OFF)
22	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX_AVX512 "ktransformers: CPU use AMX or AVX512" OFF)
23	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX "ktransformers: CPU use AMX" OFF)
24	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_DEBUG "ktransformers: DEBUG CPU use AMX" OFF)
25	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA "ktransformers: CPU use MLA" OFF)
26	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_KERNEL "ktransformers: CPU use moe kernel" OFF)
27	option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_AMD "ktransformers: CPU use moe kernel for amd" OFF)
28	option(KTRANSFORMERS_ENABLE_CPPTRACE "Enable native crash tracing in kt-kernel" OFF)
29	# LTO control
30	option(CPUINFER_ENABLE_LTO "Enable link time optimization (IPO)" OFF)
31	
32	project(kt_kernel_ext VERSION 0.6.1)
33	
34	# Auto-detect CPU features early (unless building with LLAMA_NATIVE)
35	if(NOT LLAMA_NATIVE AND NOT MSVC)
36	    include(cmake/DetectCPU.cmake)
37	endif()
38	
39	# Choose compilers BEFORE project() so CMake honors them
40	if(USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN)
41	    if(NOT DEFINED ENV{CONDA_PREFIX} OR NOT EXISTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}")
42	        message(FATAL_ERROR "USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN=ON but CONDA_PREFIX is not set. Activate your conda env or pass -DCONDA_PREFIX=/path")
43	    endif()
44	    # Locate conda GCC wrappers
45	    find_program(CONDA_CC NAMES x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-cc HINTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin")
46	    find_program(CONDA_CXX NAMES x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ HINTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin")
47	    if(NOT CONDA_CC OR NOT CONDA_CXX)
48	        message(FATAL_ERROR "Conda compilers not found in $ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin (expected x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-cc/c++).")
49	    endif()
50	    set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER   ${CONDA_CC}  CACHE FILEPATH "C compiler" FORCE)
51	    set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER ${CONDA_CXX} CACHE FILEPATH "C++ compiler" FORCE)
52	else()
53	    # Prefer system compilers explicitly to avoid accidentally picking conda wrappers from PATH
54	    if(EXISTS "/usr/bin/gcc" AND EXISTS "/usr/bin/g++")
55	        set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER   "/usr/bin/gcc" CACHE FILEPATH "C compiler" FORCE)
56	        set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "/usr/bin/g++" CACHE FILEPATH "C++ compiler" FORCE)
57	    endif()
58	endif()
59	
60	
61	# If explicitly using conda toolchain, prefer its libraries/headers and RPATH
62	if(USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN)
63	    message(STATUS "Conda prefix detected: $ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}; prioritizing it for search paths and RPATH")
64	    # Make conda come first for CMake package discovery
65	    list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH
66	        "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}"
67	        "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib/cmake"
68	        "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/share/cmake"
69	    )
70	    # Also hint direct include/lib searches
71	    list(PREPEND CMAKE_LIBRARY_PATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib")
72	    list(PREPEND CMAKE_INCLUDE_PATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/include")
73	
74	    # Ensure pkg-config prefers conda .pc files
75	    set(ENV{PKG_CONFIG_PATH} "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib/pkgconfig:$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/share/pkgconfig:$ENV{PKG_CONFIG_PATH}")
76	    # Make FindPkgConfig also search CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH
77	    set(PKG_CONFIG_USE_CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH ON)
78	
79	    # Configure RPATH so the built extension prefers conda's shared libs at runtime
80	    # Use install RPATH during build to avoid mixing with implicit system paths
81	    set(CMAKE_SKIP_BUILD_RPATH FALSE)
82	    set(CMAKE_BUILD_WITH_INSTALL_RPATH TRUE)
83	    set(CMAKE_BUILD_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib")
84	    set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib")
85	    # Do not auto-append link directories to RPATH; we want only conda path here
86	    set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH_USE_LINK_PATH OFF)
87	endif()
88	
89	## Ensure git hooks are installed when configuring the project (monorepo-aware)
90	# If we are inside a git worktree (repo root is outside kt-kernel now), invoke the installer
91	# which will link kt-kernel/.githooks into the top-level .git/hooks. Otherwise, skip.
92	find_program(GIT_BIN git)
93	if(GIT_BIN)
94	    execute_process(
95	        COMMAND "${GIT_BIN}" rev-parse --show-toplevel
96	        WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
97	        OUTPUT_VARIABLE _GIT_TOP
98	        RESULT_VARIABLE _GIT_RV
99	        OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
100	        ERROR_QUIET
101	    )
102	    if(_GIT_RV EQUAL 0 AND EXISTS "${_GIT_TOP}/.git" AND IS_DIRECTORY "${_GIT_TOP}/.git")
103	        if(EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/scripts/install-git-hooks.sh")
104	            message(STATUS "Detected git worktree at ${_GIT_TOP}; installing hooks from kt-kernel/.githooks")
105	            execute_process(
106	                COMMAND sh "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/scripts/install-git-hooks.sh"
107	                WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
108	                RESULT_VARIABLE _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_RESULT
109	                OUTPUT_VARIABLE _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_OUT
110	                ERROR_VARIABLE _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_ERR
111	            )
112	            if(NOT _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_RESULT EQUAL 0)
113	                message(FATAL_ERROR "Installing git hooks failed (exit ${_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_RESULT}).\nOutput:\n${_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_OUT}\nError:\n${_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_ERR}")
114	            endif()
115	        else()
116	            message(FATAL_ERROR "Required script 'scripts/install-git-hooks.sh' not found in kt-kernel; cannot install hooks.")
117	        endif()
118	    else()
119	        message(STATUS "No git worktree detected; skipping git hooks installation")
120	    endif()
121	else()
122	    message(STATUS "git not found; skipping git hooks installation")
123	endif()
124	
125	set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
126	set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
127	
128	# Use header-only fmt to avoid needing to link libfmt (fix undefined symbol vprint)
129	add_compile_definitions(FMT_HEADER_ONLY)
130	
131	set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -O3 -ffast-math")
132	# set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -g -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer")
133	# set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -g -O0")
134	set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)
135	find_package(OpenMP REQUIRED)
136	message(STATUS "CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS: ${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}")
137	
138	
139	include(CheckCXXCompilerFlag)
140	set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
141	
142	
143	
144	# instruction set specific
145	if(LLAMA_NATIVE)
146	    set(INS_ENB OFF)
147	else()
148	    set(INS_ENB ON)
149	endif()
150	# Architecture specific
151	# TODO: probably these flags need to be tweaked on some architectures
152	#       feel free to update the Makefile for your architecture and send a pull request or issue
153	message(STATUS "CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR: ${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}")
154	
155	set(ARCH_FLAGS "")
156	
157	if(CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES STREQUAL "arm64" OR CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM_LWR STREQUAL "arm64" OR
158	    (NOT CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES AND NOT CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM_LWR AND
159	         CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR MATCHES "^(aarch64|arm.*|ARM64)$"))
160	    message(STATUS "ARM detected")
161	    if(MSVC)
162	        add_compile_definitions(__aarch64__) # MSVC defines _M_ARM64 instead
163	        add_compile_definitions(__ARM_NEON)
164	        add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_FMA)
165	
166	        set(CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS_PREV ${CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS})
167	        string(JOIN " " CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS ${CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS} "/arch:armv8.2")
168	        check_cxx_source_compiles("#include <arm_neon.h>\nint main() { int8x16_t _a, _b; int32x4_t _s = vdotq_s32(_s, _a, _b); return 0; }" GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_DOTPROD)
169	        if(GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_DOTPROD)
170	            add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_DOTPROD)
171	        endif()
172	        check_cxx_source_compiles("#include <arm_neon.h>\nint main() { float16_t _a; float16x8_t _s = vdupq_n_f16(_a); return 0; }" GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC)
173	        if(GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC)
174	            add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC)
175	        endif()
176	        set(CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS ${CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS_PREV})
177	    else()
178	        check_cxx_compiler_flag(-mfp16-format=ieee COMPILER_SUPPORTS_FP16_FORMAT_I3E)
179	        if(NOT "${COMPILER_SUPPORTS_FP16_FORMAT_I3E}" STREQUAL "")
180	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfp16-format=ieee)
181	        endif()
182	        if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "armv6")
183	            # Raspberry Pi 1, Zero
184	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfpu=neon-fp-armv8 -mno-unaligned-access)
185	        endif()
186	        if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "armv7")
187	            if("${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME}" STREQUAL "Android")
188	                # Android armeabi-v7a
189	                list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfpu=neon-vfpv4 -mno-unaligned-access -funsafe-math-optimizations)
190	            else()
191	                # Raspberry Pi 2
192	                list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfpu=neon-fp-armv8 -mno-unaligned-access -funsafe-math-optimizations)
193	            endif()
194	        endif()
195	        if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "armv8")
196	            # Android arm64-v8a
197	            # Raspberry Pi 3, 4, Zero 2 (32-bit)
198	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mno-unaligned-access)
199	        endif()
200	        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_NEON)
201	        # list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=armv8.2-a+fp16+dotprod)
202	        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_DOTPROD)
203	        # add_compile_definitions(__aarch64__)
204	
205	        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_NEON)
206	        list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=armv8.2-a+fp16+dotprod+sve+bf16)
207	        # list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=armv8-a+dotprod+sha3+sm4+fp16fml+sve+rng+sb+ssbs+i8mm+bf16+flagm+pauth)
208	        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_DOTPROD)
209	        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_SVE)
210	        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_MATMUL_INT8)
211	        # add_compile_definitions(__aarch64__)
212	    endif()
213	elseif(CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES STREQUAL "x86_64" OR CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM_LWR MATCHES "^(x86_64|i686|amd64|x64|win32)$" OR
214	    (NOT CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES AND NOT CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM_LWR AND
215	         CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR MATCHES "^(x86_64|i686|AMD64)$"))
216	    message(STATUS "x86 detected")
217	    set(HOST_IS_X86 TRUE)
218	    add_compile_definitions(__x86_64__)
219	    if(MSVC)
220	        # instruction set detection for MSVC only
221	        if(LLAMA_NATIVE)
222	            include(cmake/FindSIMD.cmake)
223	        endif()
224	        if(LLAMA_AVX512)
225	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS /arch:AVX512)
226	            # MSVC has no compile-time flags enabling specific
227	            # AVX512 extensions, neither it defines the
228	            # macros corresponding to the extensions.
229	            # Do it manually.
230	            if(LLAMA_AVX512_VBMI)
231	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VBMI__>)
232	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VBMI__>)
233	            endif()
234	            if(LLAMA_AVX512_VNNI)
235	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
236	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
237	            endif()
238	            if(LLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD)
239	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VL__>)
240	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VL__>)
241	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512BW__>)
242	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512BW__>)
243	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512DQ__>)
244	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512DQ__>)
245	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
246	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
247	            endif()
248	            if(LLAMA_AVX512_BF16)
249	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512BF16__>)
250	                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512BF16__>)
251	            endif()
252	        elseif(LLAMA_AVX2)
253	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS /arch:AVX2)
254	        elseif(LLAMA_AVX)
255	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS /arch:AVX)
256	        endif()
257	    else()
258	        if(LLAMA_NATIVE)
259	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfma -mavx -mavx2)
260	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=native)
261	        endif()
262	        if(LLAMA_F16C)
263	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mf16c)
264	        endif()
265	        if(LLAMA_FMA)
266	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfma)
267	        endif()
268	        if(LLAMA_AVX)
269	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx -mfma -msse3 -mf16c)
270	            message(WARNING "pure AVX is not supported at least avx2")
271	        endif()
272	        if(LLAMA_AVX2)
273	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx2 -mfma -msse3 -mf16c)
274	        endif()
275	        if(LLAMA_AVX512)
276	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512f -mavx512bw -mavx512dq -mavx512vl -mfma -mf16c -msse3)
277	        endif()
278	        if(LLAMA_AVX512_VBMI)
279	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vbmi)
280	        endif()
281	        if(LLAMA_AVX512_VNNI)
282	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vnni)
283	        endif()
284	        if(LLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD)
285	            message(STATUS "AVX512-VL, AVX512-BW, AVX512-DQ, AVX512-VNNI enabled")
286	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vl)
287	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512bw)
288	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512dq)
289	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vnni)
290	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vpopcntdq)
291	        endif()
292	        if(LLAMA_AVX512_BF16)
293	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512bf16)
294	        endif()
295	    endif()
296	elseif(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "ppc64")
297	    message(STATUS "PowerPC detected")
298	    if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "ppc64le")
299	        list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mcpu=powerpc64le)
300	    else()
301	        list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mcpu=native -mtune=native)
302	        #TODO: Add  targets for Power8/Power9 (Altivec/VSX) and Power10(MMA) and query for big endian systems (ppc64/le/be)
303	    endif()
304	else()
305	    message(STATUS "Unknown architecture")
306	endif()
307	
308	if(NOT EXISTS $ENV{ROCM_PATH})
309	    if(NOT EXISTS /opt/rocm)
310	        set(ROCM_PATH /usr)
311	    else()
312	        set(ROCM_PATH /opt/rocm)
313	    endif()
314	else()
315	    set(ROCM_PATH $ENV{ROCM_PATH})
316	endif()
317	
318	list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH ${ROCM_PATH})
319	list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${ROCM_PATH}/lib64/cmake")
320	
321	if(NOT EXISTS $ENV{MUSA_PATH})
322	    if(NOT EXISTS /opt/musa)
323	        set(MUSA_PATH /usr/local/musa)
324	    else()
325	        set(MUSA_PATH /opt/musa)
326	    endif()
327	else()
328	    set(MUSA_PATH $ENV{MUSA_PATH})
329	endif()
330	
331	list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${MUSA_PATH}/cmake")
332	
333	if(NOT DEFINED MACA_PATH OR MACA_PATH STREQUAL "")
334	    if(DEFINED ENV{MACA_PATH} AND EXISTS "$ENV{MACA_PATH}")
335	        set(MACA_PATH $ENV{MACA_PATH})
336	    elseif(EXISTS /opt/maca)
337	        set(MACA_PATH /opt/maca)
338	    else()
339	        set(MACA_PATH /usr/local/maca)
340	    endif()
341	endif()
342	
343	if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_AMD)
344	    set(BLIS_ROOT "" CACHE PATH "Root directory of BLIS installation")
345	    set(_BLIS_SEARCH_DIRS)
346	    if(BLIS_ROOT)
347	        list(APPEND _BLIS_SEARCH_DIRS "${BLIS_ROOT}")
348	    endif()
349	    list(APPEND _BLIS_SEARCH_DIRS "/usr/local" "/usr")
350	
351	    find_path(BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR
352	        NAMES blis.h
353	        HINTS ${_BLIS_SEARCH_DIRS}
354	        PATH_SUFFIXES include include/blis
355	    )
356	    find_library(BLIS_LIBRARY
357	        NAMES blis
358	        HINTS ${_BLIS_SEARCH_DIRS}
359	        PATH_SUFFIXES lib lib64
360	    )
361	
362	    if(NOT BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR OR NOT BLIS_LIBRARY)
363	        message(WARNING "BLIS not found; set BLIS_ROOT or specify BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR/BLIS_LIBRARY")
364	    else()
365	        message(STATUS "Found BLIS include at ${BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR}")
366	        message(STATUS "Found BLIS library ${BLIS_LIBRARY}")
367	        set(_KT_BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR ${BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR})
368	        set(_KT_BLIS_LIBRARY ${BLIS_LIBRARY})
369	    endif()
370	    # The Python extension target (${PROJECT_NAME}) is created later by
371	    # pybind11_add_module(). Calling target_include_directories/target_link_libraries
372	    # here would fail because the target doesn't exist yet. Save the discovered
373	    # BLIS paths and apply them after the module target is created.
374	endif()
375	
376	
377	if(HOST_IS_X86)
378	    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX_AVX512)
379	        add_compile_definitions(USE_AMX_AVX_KERNEL=1)
380	        if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX)
381	            add_compile_definitions(HAVE_AMX=1)
382	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mamx-tile -mamx-bf16 -mamx-int8)
383	            message(STATUS "AMX enabled")
384	        endif()
385	        if(NOT MSVC)
386	            # AMX/SFT kernels use 256-bit AVX512 masked load/store intrinsics.
387	            # GCC requires AVX512VL in addition to AVX512BW for those intrinsics.
388	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vl)
389	        endif()
390	        # add_executable(amx-test ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/amx/amx-test.cpp)
391	        # target_link_libraries(amx-test llama)
392	        if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_DEBUG)
393	            file(GLOB AMX_TEST_SOURCES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/amx/test/*.cpp")
394	            foreach(test_src ${AMX_TEST_SOURCES})
395	                # 获取不带扩展名的文件名作为 target 名
396	                get_filename_component(test_name ${test_src} NAME_WE)
397	                add_executable(${test_name} ${test_src} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cpu_backend/shared_mem_buffer.cpp)
398	                target_link_libraries(${test_name} llama OpenMP::OpenMP_CXX numa)
399	            endforeach()
400	        endif()
401	
402	        # AVX512 extensions are auto-detected by cmake/DetectCPU.cmake
403	        # Users can override with -DLLAMA_AVX512_BF16=OFF etc.
404	        # Only add -mf16c if LLAMA_F16C is not already enabled.
405	        if(NOT LLAMA_F16C)
406	            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mf16c)
407	        endif()
408	        message(STATUS "AVX512 extensions: F=${LLAMA_AVX512}, BF16=${LLAMA_AVX512_BF16}, VNNI=${LLAMA_AVX512_VNNI}, VBMI=${LLAMA_AVX512_VBMI}")
409	    endif()
410	endif()
411	
412	message(STATUS "ARCH_FLAGS: ${ARCH_FLAGS}")
413	
414	add_compile_options("$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:${ARCH_FLAGS}>")
415	add_compile_options("$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:${ARCH_FLAGS}>")
416	
417	add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../third_party/pybind11 ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/third_party/pybind11)
418	add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../third_party/llama.cpp ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/third_party/llama.cpp)
419	
420	include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../third_party)
421	if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA)
422	    include(CheckLanguage)
423	    check_language(CUDA)
424	    if(CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER)
425	        message(STATUS "CUDA detected")
426	        find_package(CUDAToolkit REQUIRED)
427	        include_directories(${CUDAToolkit_INCLUDE_DIRS})
428	    else()
429	        message(FATAL_ERROR "KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA=ON but CUDA compiler not found")
430	    endif()
431	    message(STATUS "enabling CUDA")
432	    enable_language(CUDA)
433	    add_compile_definitions(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA=1)
434	
435	    # Set default CUDA architectures if not specified
436	    # Target: SM 80/86 (Ampere), 89 (Ada), 90 (Hopper)
437	    if(NOT DEFINED CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES)
438	        set(CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES "80;86;89;90" CACHE STRING "CUDA architectures" FORCE)
439	        message(STATUS "CUDA architectures (default): ${CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES}")
440	    else()
441	        message(STATUS "CUDA architectures (user): ${CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES}")
442	    endif()
443	
444	    # Optimization flags
445	    set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} -O3 --use_fast_math")
446	    set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} --expt-relaxed-constexpr")
447	    set(CMAKE_CUDA_STANDARD 17)
448	    set(CMAKE_CUDA_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
449	
450	    message(STATUS "CUDA compiler: ${CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER}")
451	    message(STATUS "CUDA toolkit: ${CUDAToolkit_VERSION}")
452	    message(STATUS "CUDA flags: ${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS}")
453	elseif(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM)
454	    find_package(HIP REQUIRED)
455	    if(HIP_FOUND)
456	        include_directories("${HIP_INCLUDE_DIRS}")
457	        add_compile_definitions(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM=1)
458	    endif()
459	elseif(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA)
460	    if(NOT EXISTS $ENV{MUSA_PATH})
461	        if(NOT EXISTS /opt/musa)
462	            set(MUSA_PATH /usr/local/musa)
463	        else()
464	            set(MUSA_PATH /opt/musa)
465	        endif()
466	    else()
467	        set(MUSA_PATH $ENV{MUSA_PATH})
468	    endif()
469	
470	    list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${MUSA_PATH}/cmake")
471	
472	    find_package(MUSAToolkit)
473	    if(MUSAToolkit_FOUND)
474	        message(STATUS "MUSA Toolkit found")
475	        add_compile_definitions(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA=1)
476	    endif()
477	elseif(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA)
478	    find_path(MACA_INCLUDE_DIR
479	        NAMES mcr/maca.h
480	        HINTS "${MACA_PATH}"
481	        PATH_SUFFIXES include
482	    )
483	    find_library(MACA_RUNTIME_LIBRARY
484	        NAMES mcruntime
485	        HINTS "${MACA_PATH}"
486	        PATH_SUFFIXES lib lib64
487	    )
488	    find_library(MACA_BLAS_LIBRARY
489	        NAMES mcblas
490	        HINTS "${MACA_PATH}"
491	        PATH_SUFFIXES lib lib64
492	    )
493	
494	    if(NOT MACA_INCLUDE_DIR OR NOT MACA_RUNTIME_LIBRARY OR NOT MACA_BLAS_LIBRARY)
495	        message(FATAL_ERROR "KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA=ON but MACA SDK was not found. Set MACA_PATH to the MACA SDK root.")
496	    endif()
497	
498	    message(STATUS "MACA SDK found at ${MACA_PATH}")
499	    message(STATUS "MACA include: ${MACA_INCLUDE_DIR}")
500	    message(STATUS "MACA runtime: ${MACA_RUNTIME_LIBRARY}")
501	    message(STATUS "MACA BLAS: ${MACA_BLAS_LIBRARY}")
502	    include_directories(${MACA_INCLUDE_DIR})
503	    add_compile_definitions(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA=1)
504	elseif(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML)
505	    message(STATUS "KML CPU detected")
506	else()
507	    message(STATUS "No GPU support enabled, building for CPU only")
508	    add_compile_definitions(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_ONLY=1)
509	endif()
510	
511	aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} SOURCE_DIR1)
512	aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cpu_backend SOURCE_DIR2)
513	aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/llamafile SOURCE_DIR3)
514	aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../third_party/llamafile SOURCE_DIR4)
515	aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/kvcache SOURCE_DIR5)
516	# message(STATUS "SOURCE_DIR3: ${SOURCE_DIR3}")
517	
518	# arm64
519	if(NOT HOST_IS_X86 AND KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML)
520	    aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/kml SOURCE_DIR6)

523	    endif()
524	endif()
525	# message(STATUS "SOURCE_DIR6: ${SOURCE_DIR6}")
526	
527	if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_KERNEL)
528	    aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/la SOURCE_DIR7)
529	    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_AMD)
530	        aux_source_directory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/aocl_kernel SOURCE_DIR7_KERNEL)
531	        add_compile_definitions(USE_MOE_KERNEL_AMD=1)

534	    endif()

551	)
552	# Exclude third_party directory

554	
555	## Locate a specific clang-format executable to avoid version drift
556	## Prefer newer versions first to support modern .clang-format keys
557	## You can override by passing -DCLANG_FORMAT_BIN=/full/path/to/clang-format
558	if(NOT DEFINED CLANG_FORMAT_BIN)
559	    set(_CF_HINTS
560	        $ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin
561	        $ENV{MAMBA_ROOT_PREFIX}/envs/$ENV{CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV}/bin
562	        $ENV{VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin
563	        $ENV{HOME}/.local/bin
564	    )
565	    find_program(CLANG_FORMAT_BIN
566	        NAMES clang-format-20 clang-format-19 clang-format-18 clang-format-17 clang-format-16 clang-format-15 clang-format
567	        HINTS ${_CF_HINTS}
568	    )
569	endif()
570	if(NOT CLANG_FORMAT_BIN)
571	    message(WARNING "ONLY for developer: clang-format not found. Please install clang-format (>=18) or pass -DCLANG_FORMAT_BIN=/full/path and reconfigure.")
572	else()
573	    execute_process(
574	        COMMAND ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN} --version
575	        OUTPUT_VARIABLE _CLANG_FORMAT_VER
576	        OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
577	    )
578	    # message(STATUS "CMake PATH: $ENV{PATH}")
579	    # Parse version string, e.g. "Ubuntu clang-format version 19.1.0" or "clang-format version 18.1.8"
580	    string(REGEX MATCH "version[ ]+([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)*)" _CF_VER_MATCH "${_CLANG_FORMAT_VER}")
581	    if(NOT _CF_VER_MATCH)
582	        message(WARNING "Failed to parse clang-format version from: ${_CLANG_FORMAT_VER}")
583	    endif()
584	    set(CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
585	    message(STATUS "Using clang-format ${CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION} at ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}")
586	    if(CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION VERSION_LESS "18.0.0")
587	        message(WARNING "clang-format >=18.0.0 required (found ${CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION} at ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}).\n"
588	                            "Tip: Ensure your desired clang-format (e.g., conda's ${CONDA_PREFIX}/bin/clang-format) is earlier in PATH when running CMake,\n"
589	                            "or pass -DCLANG_FORMAT_BIN=/full/path/to/clang-format.")
590	    endif()
591	    add_custom_target(
592	        format

594	                -i
595	                -style=file
596	                -fallback-style=none
597	                ${FMT_SOURCES}
598	        COMMENT "Running clang-format on all source files"
599	    )
600

602	    add_custom_target(
603	        format-check
604	        COMMAND ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}
605	                -n --Werror
606	                -style=file
607	                -fallback-style=none
608	                ${FMT_SOURCES}
609	        COMMENT "Checking clang-format on all source files"
610	    )
611	endif()

618	endif(PKG_CONFIG_FOUND)

629	else()

642	    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(cpptrace)

644	    target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE KTRANSFORMERS_ENABLE_CPPTRACE=1)
645	    message(STATUS "cpptrace: enabled")

647	
648	# If BLIS was detected earlier, apply its include directory and library to the
649	# created Python extension target. We only do this after the module target

651	if(DEFINED _KT_BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR AND DEFINED _KT_BLIS_LIBRARY)
652	    if(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME})
653	        target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${_KT_BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR})
654	        target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${_KT_BLIS_LIBRARY})
655	    else()
656	        message(WARNING "BLIS was detected earlier but ${PROJECT_NAME} target was not found when attempting to apply BLIS link/include settings.")
657	    endif()
658	endif()
659	
660	# Ensure the module target also has correct RPATH when conda is active
661	if(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME} AND DEFINED ENV{CONDA_PREFIX} AND EXISTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}")
662	    set_target_properties(${PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES
663	        BUILD_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib"
664	        INSTALL_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib"
665	        SKIP_BUILD_RPATH OFF
666	    )
667	endif()
668	if(NOT HOST_IS_X86 AND KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML)
669	    message(STATUS "KML CPU detected")
670	
671	    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/prefillgemm)
672	    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE prefillint8gemm)
673	    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/prefillgemm_int4)
674	    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE prefillint4gemm)
675	
676	    set(DECODE_GEMM_SOURCES
677	        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/batch_gemm.cpp
678	        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/batch_gemm_kernels.cpp
679	    )
680	    add_library(decode_gemm SHARED ${DECODE_GEMM_SOURCES})
681	    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE decode_gemm)  
682	    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA)
683	        target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE kml_rt)
684	    endif()
685	    target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE CPU_USE_KML)
686	endif()
687	target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE llama PkgConfig::HWLOC OpenMP::OpenMP_CXX)
688	if(NOT HOST_IS_X86 AND KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML)
689	    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_DEBUG)
690	        # add_executable(convert-test ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/kml/convert-test.cpp)
691	        # target_link_libraries(convert-test llama)
692	        file(GLOB KML_TEST_SOURCES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/kml/test/*.cpp")
693	        foreach(test_src ${KML_TEST_SOURCES})
694	            # 获取不带扩展名的文件名作为 target 名
695	            get_filename_component(test_name ${test_src} NAME_WE)
696	            add_executable(${test_name} ${test_src} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cpu_backend/shared_mem_buffer.cpp)
697	            if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA)
698	                target_link_libraries(${test_name} llama OpenMP::OpenMP_CXX numa kml_rt)
699	            endif()
700	        endforeach()
701	    endif()
702	endif()
703	
704	
705	
706	if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA)
707	    add_compile_definitions(USE_CUDA=1)
708	    # Link CUDA runtime (static or dynamic)
709	    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CUDA_STATIC_RUNTIME)
710	        # Platform-aware static library path
711	        if(WIN32)
712	            set(CUDART_STATIC_LIB "${CUDAToolkit_LIBRARY_DIR}/cudart_static.lib")
713	        else()
714	            set(CUDART_STATIC_LIB "${CUDAToolkit_LIBRARY_DIR}/libcudart_static.a")
715	        endif()
716	
717	        if(EXISTS "${CUDART_STATIC_LIB}")
718	            target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "${CUDART_STATIC_LIB}")
719	            message(STATUS "CUDA runtime: static (${CUDART_STATIC_LIB})")
720	
721	            # Linux needs additional libs for static cudart
722	            if(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
723	                target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE rt pthread dl)
724	            endif()
725	        else()
726	            message(WARNING "Static CUDA runtime not found, using dynamic")
727	            target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE CUDA::cudart)
728	        endif()
729	    else()
730	        # Dynamic linking
731	        target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE CUDA::cudart)
732	        message(STATUS "CUDA runtime: dynamic")
733	    endif()
734	endif()
735	if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM)
736	    add_compile_definitions(USE_HIP=1)
737	    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "${ROCM_PATH}/lib/libamdhip64.so")
738	    message(STATUS "Building for HIP")
739	endif()
740	if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA)
741	    add_compile_definitions(USE_MUSA=1)
742	    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE MUSA::musart)

744	endif()
745	if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA)

747	    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${MACA_RUNTIME_LIBRARY} ${MACA_BLAS_LIBRARY})
748	    message(STATUS "Building for MACA")
749	endif()
750	
751	
752	
753	find_library(NUMA_LIBRARY NAMES numa)
754	if(NUMA_LIBRARY)

759	endif()

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

# Toggle: default to system compilers; optionally use conda toolchain
option(USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN "Use C/C++ compilers and libraries from active conda env" OFF)
option(LLAMA_NATIVE "llama: enable -march=native flag" OFF)
option(LLAMA_AVX "llama: enable AVX" OFF)
option(LLAMA_AVX2 "llama: enable AVX2" OFF)
# AVX512 options will be auto-detected by cmake/DetectCPU.cmake
# Users can override with -DLLAMA_AVX512=OFF etc.
option(LLAMA_FMA "llama: enable FMA" OFF)
# in MSVC F16C is implied with AVX2/AVX512
if(NOT MSVC)
    option(LLAMA_F16C "llama: enable F16C" OFF)
endif()
option(LLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD "llama: enable AVX512-VL, AVX512-BW, AVX512-DQ, AVX512-VNNI" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA "ktransformers: use CUDA" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA "ktransformers: use MUSA" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM "ktransformers: use ROCM" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA "ktransformers: use MACA" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CUDA_STATIC_RUNTIME "ktransformers: statically link CUDA runtime" ON)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML "ktransformers: CPU use KML" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX_AVX512 "ktransformers: CPU use AMX or AVX512" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX "ktransformers: CPU use AMX" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_DEBUG "ktransformers: DEBUG CPU use AMX" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA "ktransformers: CPU use MLA" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_KERNEL "ktransformers: CPU use moe kernel" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_AMD "ktransformers: CPU use moe kernel for amd" OFF)
option(KTRANSFORMERS_ENABLE_CPPTRACE "Enable native crash tracing in kt-kernel" OFF)
# LTO control
option(CPUINFER_ENABLE_LTO "Enable link time optimization (IPO)" OFF)

project(kt_kernel_ext VERSION 0.6.1)

# Auto-detect CPU features early (unless building with LLAMA_NATIVE)
if(NOT LLAMA_NATIVE AND NOT MSVC)
    include(cmake/DetectCPU.cmake)
endif()

# Choose compilers BEFORE project() so CMake honors them
if(USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN)
    if(NOT DEFINED ENV{CONDA_PREFIX} OR NOT EXISTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}")
        message(FATAL_ERROR "USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN=ON but CONDA_PREFIX is not set. Activate your conda env or pass -DCONDA_PREFIX=/path")
    endif()
    # Locate conda GCC wrappers
    find_program(CONDA_CC NAMES x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-cc HINTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin")
    find_program(CONDA_CXX NAMES x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ HINTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin")
    if(NOT CONDA_CC OR NOT CONDA_CXX)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Conda compilers not found in $ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin (expected x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-cc/c++).")
    endif()
    set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER   ${CONDA_CC}  CACHE FILEPATH "C compiler" FORCE)
    set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER ${CONDA_CXX} CACHE FILEPATH "C++ compiler" FORCE)
else()
    # Prefer system compilers explicitly to avoid accidentally picking conda wrappers from PATH
    if(EXISTS "/usr/bin/gcc" AND EXISTS "/usr/bin/g++")
        set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER   "/usr/bin/gcc" CACHE FILEPATH "C compiler" FORCE)
        set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "/usr/bin/g++" CACHE FILEPATH "C++ compiler" FORCE)
    endif()
endif()


# If explicitly using conda toolchain, prefer its libraries/headers and RPATH
if(USE_CONDA_TOOLCHAIN)
    message(STATUS "Conda prefix detected: $ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}; prioritizing it for search paths and RPATH")
    # Make conda come first for CMake package discovery
    list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH
        "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}"
        "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib/cmake"
        "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/share/cmake"
    )
    # Also hint direct include/lib searches
    list(PREPEND CMAKE_LIBRARY_PATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib")
    list(PREPEND CMAKE_INCLUDE_PATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/include")

    # Ensure pkg-config prefers conda .pc files
    set(ENV{PKG_CONFIG_PATH} "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib/pkgconfig:$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/share/pkgconfig:$ENV{PKG_CONFIG_PATH}")
    # Make FindPkgConfig also search CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH
    set(PKG_CONFIG_USE_CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH ON)

    # Configure RPATH so the built extension prefers conda's shared libs at runtime
    # Use install RPATH during build to avoid mixing with implicit system paths
    set(CMAKE_SKIP_BUILD_RPATH FALSE)
    set(CMAKE_BUILD_WITH_INSTALL_RPATH TRUE)
    set(CMAKE_BUILD_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib")
    set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib")
    # Do not auto-append link directories to RPATH; we want only conda path here
    set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH_USE_LINK_PATH OFF)
endif()

## Ensure git hooks are installed when configuring the project (monorepo-aware)
# If we are inside a git worktree (repo root is outside kt-kernel now), invoke the installer
# which will link kt-kernel/.githooks into the top-level .git/hooks. Otherwise, skip.
find_program(GIT_BIN git)
if(GIT_BIN)
    execute_process(
        COMMAND "${GIT_BIN}" rev-parse --show-toplevel
        WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
        OUTPUT_VARIABLE _GIT_TOP
        RESULT_VARIABLE _GIT_RV
        OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
        ERROR_QUIET
    )
    if(_GIT_RV EQUAL 0 AND EXISTS "${_GIT_TOP}/.git" AND IS_DIRECTORY "${_GIT_TOP}/.git")
        if(EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/scripts/install-git-hooks.sh")
            message(STATUS "Detected git worktree at ${_GIT_TOP}; installing hooks from kt-kernel/.githooks")
            execute_process(
                COMMAND sh "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/scripts/install-git-hooks.sh"
                WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
                RESULT_VARIABLE _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_RESULT
                OUTPUT_VARIABLE _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_OUT
                ERROR_VARIABLE _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_ERR
            )
            if(NOT _INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_RESULT EQUAL 0)
                message(FATAL_ERROR "Installing git hooks failed (exit ${_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_RESULT}).\nOutput:\n${_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_OUT}\nError:\n${_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS_ERR}")
            endif()
        else()
            message(FATAL_ERROR "Required script 'scripts/install-git-hooks.sh' not found in kt-kernel; cannot install hooks.")
        endif()
    else()
        message(STATUS "No git worktree detected; skipping git hooks installation")
    endif()
else()
    message(STATUS "git not found; skipping git hooks installation")
endif()

         CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR MATCHES "^(aarch64|arm.*|ARM64)$"))
    message(STATUS "ARM detected")
    if(MSVC)
        add_compile_definitions(__aarch64__) # MSVC defines _M_ARM64 instead
        add_compile_definitions(__ARM_NEON)
        add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_FMA)

        set(CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS_PREV ${CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS})
        string(JOIN " " CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS ${CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS} "/arch:armv8.2")
        check_cxx_source_compiles("#include <arm_neon.h>\nint main() { int8x16_t _a, _b; int32x4_t _s = vdotq_s32(_s, _a, _b); return 0; }" GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_DOTPROD)
        if(GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_DOTPROD)
            add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_DOTPROD)
        endif()
        check_cxx_source_compiles("#include <arm_neon.h>\nint main() { float16_t _a; float16x8_t _s = vdupq_n_f16(_a); return 0; }" GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC)
        if(GGML_COMPILER_SUPPORT_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC)
            add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC)
        endif()
        set(CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS ${CMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS_PREV})
    else()
        check_cxx_compiler_flag(-mfp16-format=ieee COMPILER_SUPPORTS_FP16_FORMAT_I3E)
        if(NOT "${COMPILER_SUPPORTS_FP16_FORMAT_I3E}" STREQUAL "")
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfp16-format=ieee)
        endif()
        if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "armv6")
            # Raspberry Pi 1, Zero
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfpu=neon-fp-armv8 -mno-unaligned-access)
        endif()
        if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "armv7")
            if("${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME}" STREQUAL "Android")
                # Android armeabi-v7a
                list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfpu=neon-vfpv4 -mno-unaligned-access -funsafe-math-optimizations)
            else()
                # Raspberry Pi 2
                list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfpu=neon-fp-armv8 -mno-unaligned-access -funsafe-math-optimizations)
            endif()
        endif()
        if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "armv8")
            # Android arm64-v8a
            # Raspberry Pi 3, 4, Zero 2 (32-bit)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mno-unaligned-access)
        endif()
        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_NEON)
        # list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=armv8.2-a+fp16+dotprod)
        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_DOTPROD)
        # add_compile_definitions(__aarch64__)

        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_NEON)
        list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=armv8.2-a+fp16+dotprod+sve+bf16)
        # list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=armv8-a+dotprod+sha3+sm4+fp16fml+sve+rng+sb+ssbs+i8mm+bf16+flagm+pauth)
        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_DOTPROD)
        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_SVE)
        # add_compile_definitions(__ARM_FEATURE_MATMUL_INT8)
        # add_compile_definitions(__aarch64__)
    endif()
elseif(CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES STREQUAL "x86_64" OR CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM_LWR MATCHES "^(x86_64|i686|amd64|x64|win32)$" OR
    (NOT CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES AND NOT CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM_LWR AND
         CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR MATCHES "^(x86_64|i686|AMD64)$"))
    message(STATUS "x86 detected")
    set(HOST_IS_X86 TRUE)
    add_compile_definitions(__x86_64__)
    if(MSVC)
        # instruction set detection for MSVC only
        if(LLAMA_NATIVE)
            include(cmake/FindSIMD.cmake)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX512)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS /arch:AVX512)
            # MSVC has no compile-time flags enabling specific
            # AVX512 extensions, neither it defines the
            # macros corresponding to the extensions.
            # Do it manually.
            if(LLAMA_AVX512_VBMI)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VBMI__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VBMI__>)
            endif()
            if(LLAMA_AVX512_VNNI)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
            endif()
            if(LLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VL__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VL__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512BW__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512BW__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512DQ__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512DQ__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512VNNI__>)
            endif()
            if(LLAMA_AVX512_BF16)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:__AVX512BF16__>)
                add_compile_definitions($<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:__AVX512BF16__>)
            endif()
        elseif(LLAMA_AVX2)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS /arch:AVX2)
        elseif(LLAMA_AVX)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS /arch:AVX)
        endif()
    else()
        if(LLAMA_NATIVE)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfma -mavx -mavx2)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -march=native)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_F16C)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mf16c)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_FMA)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mfma)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx -mfma -msse3 -mf16c)
            message(WARNING "pure AVX is not supported at least avx2")
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX2)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx2 -mfma -msse3 -mf16c)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX512)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512f -mavx512bw -mavx512dq -mavx512vl -mfma -mf16c -msse3)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX512_VBMI)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vbmi)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX512_VNNI)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vnni)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD)
            message(STATUS "AVX512-VL, AVX512-BW, AVX512-DQ, AVX512-VNNI enabled")
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vl)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512bw)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512dq)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vnni)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512vpopcntdq)
        endif()
        if(LLAMA_AVX512_BF16)
            list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mavx512bf16)
        endif()
    endif()
elseif(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "ppc64")
    message(STATUS "PowerPC detected")
    if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} MATCHES "ppc64le")
        list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mcpu=powerpc64le)
    else()
        list(APPEND ARCH_FLAGS -mcpu=native -mtune=native)
        #TODO: Add  targets for Power8/Power9 (Altivec/VSX) and Power10(MMA) and query for big endian systems (ppc64/le/be)
    endif()
else()
    message(STATUS "Unknown architecture")
endif()

## Locate a specific clang-format executable to avoid version drift
## Prefer newer versions first to support modern .clang-format keys
## You can override by passing -DCLANG_FORMAT_BIN=/full/path/to/clang-format
if(NOT DEFINED CLANG_FORMAT_BIN)
    set(_CF_HINTS
        $ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/bin
        $ENV{MAMBA_ROOT_PREFIX}/envs/$ENV{CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV}/bin
        $ENV{VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin
        $ENV{HOME}/.local/bin
    )
    find_program(CLANG_FORMAT_BIN
        NAMES clang-format-20 clang-format-19 clang-format-18 clang-format-17 clang-format-16 clang-format-15 clang-format
        HINTS ${_CF_HINTS}
    )
endif()
if(NOT CLANG_FORMAT_BIN)
    message(WARNING "ONLY for developer: clang-format not found. Please install clang-format (>=18) or pass -DCLANG_FORMAT_BIN=/full/path and reconfigure.")
else()
    execute_process(
        COMMAND ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN} --version
        OUTPUT_VARIABLE _CLANG_FORMAT_VER
        OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
    )
    # message(STATUS "CMake PATH: $ENV{PATH}")
    # Parse version string, e.g. "Ubuntu clang-format version 19.1.0" or "clang-format version 18.1.8"
    string(REGEX MATCH "version[ ]+([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)*)" _CF_VER_MATCH "${_CLANG_FORMAT_VER}")
    if(NOT _CF_VER_MATCH)
        message(WARNING "Failed to parse clang-format version from: ${_CLANG_FORMAT_VER}")
    endif()
    set(CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
    message(STATUS "Using clang-format ${CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION} at ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}")
    if(CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION VERSION_LESS "18.0.0")
        message(WARNING "clang-format >=18.0.0 required (found ${CLANG_FORMAT_VERSION} at ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}).\n"
                            "Tip: Ensure your desired clang-format (e.g., conda's ${CONDA_PREFIX}/bin/clang-format) is earlier in PATH when running CMake,\n"
                            "or pass -DCLANG_FORMAT_BIN=/full/path/to/clang-format.")
    endif()
    add_custom_target(
        format
        COMMAND ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}
                -i
                -style=file
                -fallback-style=none
                ${FMT_SOURCES}
        COMMENT "Running clang-format on all source files"
    )

    # Optional: target to check formatting without modifying files (CI-friendly)
    add_custom_target(
        format-check
        COMMAND ${CLANG_FORMAT_BIN}
                -n --Werror
                -style=file
                -fallback-style=none
                ${FMT_SOURCES}
        COMMENT "Checking clang-format on all source files"
    )
endif()

include(FindPkgConfig)
if(PKG_CONFIG_FOUND)
    pkg_search_module(HWLOC REQUIRED IMPORTED_TARGET hwloc)
else(PKG_CONFIG_FOUND)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "FindHWLOC needs pkg-config program and PKG_CONFIG_PATH must contain the path to hwloc.pc file.")
endif(PKG_CONFIG_FOUND)


add_library(llamafile STATIC ${SOURCE_DIR4})


if(CPUINFER_ENABLE_LTO)
    set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION ON)
    # Use THIN_LTO keyword only if supported compiler (Clang). GCC ignores it.
    pybind11_add_module(${PROJECT_NAME} MODULE THIN_LTO ${ALL_SOURCES})
    message(STATUS "LTO: enabled")
else()
    set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION OFF)
    pybind11_add_module(${PROJECT_NAME} MODULE ${ALL_SOURCES})
    message(STATUS "LTO: disabled")
endif()

if(KTRANSFORMERS_ENABLE_CPPTRACE)
    include(FetchContent)
    FetchContent_Declare(
      cpptrace
      GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/jeremy-rifkin/cpptrace.git
      GIT_TAG        v1.0.4
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(cpptrace)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE cpptrace::cpptrace)
    target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE KTRANSFORMERS_ENABLE_CPPTRACE=1)
    message(STATUS "cpptrace: enabled")
endif()

# If BLIS was detected earlier, apply its include directory and library to the
# created Python extension target. We only do this after the module target
# (${PROJECT_NAME}) has been created by pybind11_add_module().
if(DEFINED _KT_BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR AND DEFINED _KT_BLIS_LIBRARY)
    if(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME})
        target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${_KT_BLIS_INCLUDE_DIR})
        target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${_KT_BLIS_LIBRARY})
    else()
        message(WARNING "BLIS was detected earlier but ${PROJECT_NAME} target was not found when attempting to apply BLIS link/include settings.")
    endif()
endif()

# Ensure the module target also has correct RPATH when conda is active
if(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME} AND DEFINED ENV{CONDA_PREFIX} AND EXISTS "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}")
    set_target_properties(${PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES
        BUILD_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib"
        INSTALL_RPATH "$ENV{CONDA_PREFIX}/lib"
        SKIP_BUILD_RPATH OFF
    )
endif()
if(NOT HOST_IS_X86 AND KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML)
    message(STATUS "KML CPU detected")

    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/prefillgemm)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE prefillint8gemm)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/prefillgemm_int4)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE prefillint4gemm)

    set(DECODE_GEMM_SOURCES
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/batch_gemm.cpp
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/moe_kernel/mat_kernel/kml_kernel/batch_gemm_kernels.cpp
    )
    add_library(decode_gemm SHARED ${DECODE_GEMM_SOURCES})
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE decode_gemm)  
    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA)
        target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE kml_rt)
    endif()
    target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE CPU_USE_KML)
endif()
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE llama PkgConfig::HWLOC OpenMP::OpenMP_CXX)
if(NOT HOST_IS_X86 AND KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML)
    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_DEBUG)
        # add_executable(convert-test ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/kml/convert-test.cpp)
        # target_link_libraries(convert-test llama)
        file(GLOB KML_TEST_SOURCES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/operators/kml/test/*.cpp")
        foreach(test_src ${KML_TEST_SOURCES})
            # 获取不带扩展名的文件名作为 target 名
            get_filename_component(test_name ${test_src} NAME_WE)
            add_executable(${test_name} ${test_src} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cpu_backend/shared_mem_buffer.cpp)
            if(KTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA)
                target_link_libraries(${test_name} llama OpenMP::OpenMP_CXX numa kml_rt)
            endif()
        endforeach()
    endif()
endif()



if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA)
    add_compile_definitions(USE_CUDA=1)
    # Link CUDA runtime (static or dynamic)
    if(KTRANSFORMERS_CUDA_STATIC_RUNTIME)
        # Platform-aware static library path
        if(WIN32)
            set(CUDART_STATIC_LIB "${CUDAToolkit_LIBRARY_DIR}/cudart_static.lib")
        else()
            set(CUDART_STATIC_LIB "${CUDAToolkit_LIBRARY_DIR}/libcudart_static.a")
        endif()

        if(EXISTS "${CUDART_STATIC_LIB}")
            target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "${CUDART_STATIC_LIB}")
            message(STATUS "CUDA runtime: static (${CUDART_STATIC_LIB})")

            # Linux needs additional libs for static cudart
            if(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
                target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE rt pthread dl)
            endif()
        else()
            message(WARNING "Static CUDA runtime not found, using dynamic")
            target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE CUDA::cudart)
        endif()
    else()
        # Dynamic linking
        target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE CUDA::cudart)
        message(STATUS "CUDA runtime: dynamic")
    endif()
endif()
if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM)
    add_compile_definitions(USE_HIP=1)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "${ROCM_PATH}/lib/libamdhip64.so")
    message(STATUS "Building for HIP")
endif()
if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA)
    add_compile_definitions(USE_MUSA=1)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE MUSA::musart)
    message(STATUS "Building for MUSA")
endif()
if(KTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA)
    add_compile_definitions(USE_MACA=1)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${MACA_RUNTIME_LIBRARY} ${MACA_BLAS_LIBRARY})
    message(STATUS "Building for MACA")
endif()



find_library(NUMA_LIBRARY NAMES numa)
if(NUMA_LIBRARY)
    message(STATUS "NUMA library found: ${NUMA_LIBRARY} - enabling NUMA support")
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${NUMA_LIBRARY})
else()
    message(FATAL_ERROR "NUMA library not found, please install NUMA, sudo apt install libnuma-dev")
endif()

1	#!/usr/bin/env python
2	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
3	"""
4	Lightweight packaging script for building and distributing kt-kernel,
5	a high-performance kernel operations library for KTransformers.
6	
7	    pip install kt-kernel
8	    >>> from kt_kernel import AMXMoEWrapper
9	
10	This script drives your existing CMake build (root `CMakeLists.txt`) and
11	only needs a working C++ toolchain, CMake (>=3.16), and pybind11 (vendored
12	already in the repo).
13	
14	Environment knobs (export before running pip install .):
15	  CPUINFER_FORCE_REBUILD=1        Always rebuild (ignore any cached build)
16	  CPUINFER_BUILD_TYPE=Release     Debug / RelWithDebInfo / Release
17	  CPUINFER_PARALLEL=8             Parallel build jobs (auto = detected cores)
18	  CPUINFER_CPU_INSTRUCT=FANCY     One of: NATIVE|FANCY|AVX512|AVX2 (maps to CMake flags)
19	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_AMX=OFF         ON/OFF -> -DKTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX
20	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_MLA=OFF         ON/OFF -> -DKTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MLA
21	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_BLIS=OFF         ON/OFF -> -DKTRANSFORMERS_CPU_MOE_AMD
22	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_KML=OFF         ON/OFF -> -DKTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_KML
23	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_AVX512=OFF      ON/OFF -> -DKTRANSFORMERS_CPU_USE_AMX_AVX512
24	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_AVX512_VNNI=OFF ON/OFF -> -DLLAMA_AVX512_VNNI
25	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_AVX512_BF16=OFF ON/OFF -> -DLLAMA_AVX512_BF16
26	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_AVX512_VBMI=OFF ON/OFF -> -DLLAMA_AVX512_VBMI (required for FP8 MoE)
27	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_CPPTRACE=ON/OFF  ON/OFF -> -DKTRANSFORMERS_ENABLE_CPPTRACE (debug-only)
28	  CPUINFER_BLIS_ROOT=/path/to/blis  Forward to -DBLIS_ROOT
29	
30	
31	  CPUINFER_ENABLE_LTO=ON          ON/OFF -> -DCPUINFER_ENABLE_LTO (your added option)
32	  CPUINFER_LTO_JOBS=8             Forward to -DCPUINFER_LTO_JOBS
33	  CPUINFER_LTO_MODE=auto          Forward to -DCPUINFER_LTO_MODE
34	  CPUINFER_NATIVE=ON               (override LLAMA_NATIVE)
35	
36	
37	GPU backends:
38	  CPUINFER_USE_CUDA=0/1           -DKTRANSFORMERS_USE_CUDA
39	  CPUINFER_USE_ROCM=0/1           -DKTRANSFORMERS_USE_ROCM
40	  CPUINFER_USE_MUSA=0/1           -DKTRANSFORMERS_USE_MUSA
41	  CPUINFER_USE_MACA=0/1           -DKTRANSFORMERS_USE_MACA
42	  MACA_PATH=/opt/maca             MACA SDK root
43	
44	Usage:
45	  pip install .
46	Or build wheel:
47	  python -m build  (if you have build/installed)
48	
49	Resulting wheel exposes a top-level package `kt_kernel` with AMXMoEWrapper and other kernel wrappers.
50	"""
51	from __future__ import annotations
52	import os
53	import re
54	import sys
55	import platform
56	import subprocess
57	from pathlib import Path
58	from setuptools import setup, Extension
59	from setuptools.command.build_ext import build_ext
60	import shutil
61	
62	
63	# -------------------------
64	# Env parsing helpers
65	# -------------------------
66	def _env_get_bool(name: str, default: bool | None = None) -> bool | None:
67	    v = os.environ.get(name)
68	    if v is None:
69	        return default
70	    val = v.strip().lower()
71	    if val in ("1", "on", "true", "yes", "y", "enable", "enabled"):
72	        return True
73	    if val in ("0", "off", "false", "no", "n", "disable", "disabled"):
74	        return False
75	    return default
76	
77	
78	def _cmake_onoff(flag: bool) -> str:
79	    return "ON" if flag else "OFF"
80	
81	
82	def _forward_bool_env(cmake_args: list[str], env_name: str, cmake_flag: str) -> bool:
83	    """If env exists, forward it to CMake as -D<flag>=ON/OFF and return True; else return False."""
84	    b = _env_get_bool(env_name, None)
85	    if b is None:
86	        return False
87	    cmake_args.append(f"-D{cmake_flag}={_cmake_onoff(b)}")
88	    print(f"-- Forward {env_name} -> -D{cmake_flag}={_cmake_onoff(b)}")
89	    return True
90	
91	
92	def _forward_str_env(cmake_args: list[str], env_name: str, cmake_flag: str) -> bool:
93	    v = os.environ.get(env_name)
94	    if not v:
95	        return False
96	    cmake_args.append(f"-D{cmake_flag}={v}")
97	    print(f"-- Forward {env_name} -> -D{cmake_flag}={v}")
98	    return True
99	
100	
101	################################################################################
102	# Helpers
103	################################################################################
104	
105	REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()
106	
107	# setuptools resolves package_dir and inplace extension copy paths relative to
108	# the current working directory. Keep direct invocations like
109	# `python kt-kernel/setup.py build_ext --inplace` equivalent to running from
110	# inside kt-kernel.
111	os.chdir(REPO_ROOT)
112	
113	CPU_FEATURE_MAP = {
114	    "FANCY": "-DLLAMA_NATIVE=OFF -DLLAMA_FMA=ON -DLLAMA_F16C=ON -DLLAMA_AVX=ON -DLLAMA_AVX2=ON -DLLAMA_AVX512=ON -DLLAMA_AVX512_FANCY_SIMD=ON",
115	    "AVX512": "-DLLAMA_NATIVE=OFF -DLLAMA_FMA=ON -DLLAMA_F16C=ON -DLLAMA_AVX=ON -DLLAMA_AVX2=ON -DLLAMA_AVX512=ON",
116	    "AVX2": "-DLLAMA_NATIVE=OFF -DLLAMA_FMA=ON -DLLAMA_F16C=ON -DLLAMA_AVX=ON -DLLAMA_AVX2=ON",
117	    "NATIVE": "-DLLAMA_NATIVE=ON",
118	}
119	
120	
121	def default_build_type() -> str:
122	    return os.environ.get("CPUINFER_BUILD_TYPE", "Release")
123	
124	
125	def detect_parallel_jobs() -> str:
126	    if "CPUINFER_PARALLEL" in os.environ:
127	        return os.environ["CPUINFER_PARALLEL"]
128	    try:
129	        import multiprocessing
130	
131	        return str(multiprocessing.cpu_count())
132	    except Exception:
133	        return "1"
134	
135	
136	def cpu_feature_flags() -> list[str]:
137	    mode = os.environ.get("CPUINFER_CPU_INSTRUCT", "NATIVE").upper()
138	    return [tok for tok in CPU_FEATURE_MAP.get(mode, CPU_FEATURE_MAP["NATIVE"]).split() if tok]
139	
140	
141	################################################################################
142	# CMakeExtension + builder
143	################################################################################
144	
145	
146	class CMakeExtension(Extension):
147	    def __init__(self, name: str, sourcedir: str = ""):
148	        super().__init__(name, sources=[])
149	        self.sourcedir = str(Path(sourcedir).resolve())
150	
151	
152	class CMakeBuild(build_ext):
153	    def run(self):
154	        # Ensure CMake present
155	        try:
156	            subprocess.run(["cmake", "--version"], check=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
157	        except Exception as e:  # pragma: no cover
158	            raise RuntimeError("CMake is required to build this project") from e
159	        super().run()
160	
161	    def detect_cpu_info(self) -> dict:
162	        """Detect CPU vendor/arch and instruction set features.
163	
164	        Returns a dict like:
165	            {
166	                'vendor': 'intel'|'amd'|'arm'|'unknown',
167	                'arch': platform.machine().lower(),
168	                'features': set(['AVX2','AVX512','AMX']),
169	                'raw': { 'flags': set([...]) }
170	            }
171	        """
172	        info = {
173	            "vendor": "unknown",
174	            "arch": platform.machine().lower(),
175	            "features": set(),
176	            "raw": {"flags": set()},
177	        }
178	        try:
179	            sysname = platform.system()
180	            if sysname == "Linux":
181	                with open("/proc/cpuinfo", "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
182	                    cpuinfo = f.read()
183	                low = cpuinfo.lower()
184	
185	                # vendor
186	                if "vendor_id" in low:
187	                    # Typical x86 linux
188	                    m = re.search(r"vendor_id\s*:\s*(\S+)", cpuinfo)
189	                    if m:
190	                        v = m.group(1).lower()
191	                        if "genuineintel" in v:
192	                            info["vendor"] = "intel"
193	                        elif "authenticamd" in v:
194	                            info["vendor"] = "amd"
195	                # ARM sometimes has 'model name' or 'Hardware'
196	                if info["vendor"] == "unknown":
197	                    if any(tok in low for tok in ["aarch64", "armv8", "arm cortex", "kunpeng", "kirin", "huawei"]):
198	                        info["vendor"] = "arm"
199	
200	                # flags collection (x86 uses 'flags', arm uses 'Features')
201	                flags = set()
202	                for key in ("flags", "Features", "features"):
203	                    m = re.search(rf"^{key}\s*:\s*(.+)$", cpuinfo, re.IGNORECASE | re.MULTILINE)
204	                    if m:
205	                        flags.update(m.group(1).lower().split())
206	                info["raw"]["flags"] = flags
207	
208	                # feature summary
209	                if any(f in flags or f in low for f in ["avx512f", "avx512bw", "avx512dq", "avx512vl"]):
210	                    info["features"].add("AVX512")
211	                if "avx2" in flags or "avx2" in low:
212	                    info["features"].add("AVX2")
213	                # AMX flags on Linux are with underscores; keep hyphen fallback just in case
214	                if any(
215	                    f in flags or f in low
216	                    for f in ["amx_bf16", "amx_int8", "amx_tile", "amx-bf16", "amx-int8", "amx-tile"]
217	                ):
218	                    info["features"].add("AMX")
219	
220	                # Fine-grained AVX512 subset detection
221	                if any(f in flags for f in ["avx512_vnni", "avx512vnni"]):
222	                    info["features"].add("AVX512_VNNI")
223	                if any(f in flags for f in ["avx512_bf16", "avx512bf16"]):
224	                    info["features"].add("AVX512_BF16")
225	                if any(f in flags for f in ["avx512_vbmi", "avx512vbmi"]):
226	                    info["features"].add("AVX512_VBMI")
227	                if any(f in flags for f in ["avx512_vpopcntdq", "avx512vpopcntdq"]):
228	                    info["features"].add("AVX512_VPOPCNTDQ")
229	
230	            elif sysname == "Darwin":
231	                # macOS: Apple Silicon (arm64) vs Intel
232	                arch = platform.machine().lower()
233	                info["arch"] = arch
234	                if arch in ("arm64", "aarch64"):
235	                    info["vendor"] = "arm"
236	                else:
237	                    info["vendor"] = "intel"
238	                # No AVX/AMX on Apple Silicon; assume none
239	
240	            elif sysname == "Windows":
241	                # Minimal detection via arch; detailed CPUID omitted for brevity
242	                arch = platform.machine().lower()
243	                info["arch"] = arch
244	                if arch in ("arm64", "aarch64"):
245	                    info["vendor"] = "arm"
246	                else:
247	                    # Could be Intel or AMD; leave unknown
248	                    info["vendor"] = "unknown"
249	        except Exception as e:
250	            print(f"Warning: CPU detection failed: {e}")
251	        return info
252	
253	    def build_extension(self, ext: CMakeExtension):
254	        """
255	        Main entry point for building the extension.
256	
257	        Checks if multi-variant build is requested (CPUINFER_BUILD_ALL_VARIANTS=1)
258	        and routes to the appropriate build method.
259	        """
260	        if _env_get_bool("CPUINFER_BUILD_ALL_VARIANTS", False):
261	            # Build all 3 variants (AMX, AVX512, AVX2)
262	            self.build_multi_variants(ext)
263	        else:
264	            # Build single variant (original behavior)
265	            self._build_single_variant(ext)
266	
267	    def build_multi_variants(self, ext: CMakeExtension):
268	        """
269	        Build all 6 CPU variants with progressive AVX512 capabilities.
270	
271	        This creates 6 separate .so files optimized for different CPU generations:
272	        - _kt_kernel_ext_avx2.so         (Haswell+, 2013)
273	        - _kt_kernel_ext_avx512_base.so  (Skylake-X+, 2017)
274	        - _kt_kernel_ext_avx512_vnni.so  (Cascade Lake+, 2019)
275	        - _kt_kernel_ext_avx512_vbmi.so  (Ice Lake client, 2019)
276	        - _kt_kernel_ext_avx512_bf16.so  (Ice Lake server/Zen 4+, 2021)
277	        - _kt_kernel_ext_amx.so          (Sapphire Rapids+, 2023)
278	
279	        Runtime CPU detection (in _cpu_detect.py) will automatically select the best match.
280	        """
281	        print("=" * 70)
282	        print("Building kt-kernel with ALL 6 CPU variants")
283	        print("=" * 70)
284	        print()
285	        print("This will build six progressive variants in a single wheel:")
286	        print("  1. AVX2          - Haswell+ (2013)")
287	        print("  2. AVX512 Base   - Skylake-X+ (2017)")
288	        print("  3. AVX512+VNNI   - Cascade Lake+ (2019)")
289	        print("  4. AVX512+VBMI   - Ice Lake client (2019)")
290	        print("  5. AVX512+BF16   - Ice Lake server, Zen 4+ (2021)")
291	        print("  6. AMX           - Sapphire Rapids+ (2023)")
292	        print()
293	        print("Runtime CPU detection will automatically select the best variant.")
294	        print()
295

441	    def _build_single_variant(self, ext: CMakeExtension):
442	        """Original single-variant build logic - wrapper for backward compatibility."""
443	        extdir = Path(self.get_ext_fullpath(ext.name)).parent.resolve()
444	        cfg = default_build_type()
445	        build_temp = Path(self.build_temp) / f"{ext.name}_{cfg}"
446	        build_temp.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
447	
448	        self._build_single_variant_impl(ext, extdir, build_temp, cfg)
